hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in **/posts/**/*.md) python3 -c "import sys,yaml; yaml.safe_load(open(sys.argv[1]).read().split('\''---'\''[1])" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && echo "✓ Frontmatter valid" || echo "⚠ Frontmatter validation skipped";; esac; true'
bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in **/posts/**/*.md) if grep -qE "^\`\`\`$" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "⚠ Code block without language tag found"; fi;; esac; true'

_comments.frontmatter-validator: Validates YAML frontmatter in blog posts
_comments.code-block-linter: Warns about code blocks missing language tags
